//: Plain CSS only (no SCSS). Prettier owns formatting; this config keeps Stylelint to code-quality rules and disables the ones that fight Prettier or flag framework-imposed names.

rules.//rule-empty-line-before: Prettier does not insert blank lines between adjacent rules; let it own spacing.
rules.//selector-id-pattern: OctoPrint generates the navbar container id as navbar_plugin_<identifier> (snake_case, referenced from JS/templates). Allow snake_case ids alongside kebab-case instead of forcing a rename that would break the selector.
rules.//scss: This file is plain CSS, not SCSS — the scss/* rules Codacy enabled do not apply and their names are invalid in core Stylelint.
